Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Permits the town of Southeast, Putnam county, to lease certain sports field fences for advertisements
Summary: Permits the town of Southeast, Putnam county, to lease fences at the John E. Markel Memorial Park for advertisements.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to permitting the town of Southeast, Putnam county, to lease certain sports field fences for advertisements
